subcodes.first_line: They who have disbelieved in God and His Manifestation, and have rejected that which hath descended from His glorious and wondrous Kingdom, are verily among the lost. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد خسر الذین کفروا بالله و ظهوره و انکروا ما نزل من ملکوته العزیز البدیع قل
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high
